quantity.description: The number of shares requested to be exercised.

fairMarketValueAsOfDate.description: The date of the fair market value relevant to this exercise.

exerciseDate.description: The date when the exercise request was initiated.

status.description: The status of the exercise request.

certificateId.description: The identifier of the certificate that was issued. This field is set if the exercise has been completed and a certificate has been issued.

qualified.description:
*Deprecated*

True if the exercise option grant type is ISO. False otherwise.
qualified.title: *Deprecated*

schema_def.description: The list of all exercises associated with this grant.
